name: rbac-service
description: Baalvion RBAC Core — multi-tenant, hierarchical role service (super_admin > country_admin > organization_admin > end_user). Phase 1 of the RBAC platform (roles + hierarchy + assignment); permission engine and policy engine layer on top without conflict.

scripts.migrate: psql $DATABASE_URL -f migrations/001_rbac_schema.sql && psql $DATABASE_URL -f migrations/002_permissions.sql && psql $DATABASE_URL -f migrations/003_policies.sql && psql $DATABASE_URL -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/004_rls_tenant_isolation.sql
